verses.kjv: PAUL, an apostle of Jesus Christ by the will of God, according to the promise of life which is in Christ Jesus,
verses.bsb: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by the will of God, according to the promise of life in Christ Jesus,

verses.kjv: To Timothy, my dearly beloved son: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.
verses.bsb: To Timothy, my beloved child:  Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.

verses.kjv: I thank God, whom I serve from my forefathers with pure conscience, that without ceasing I have remembrance of thee in my prayers night and day;
verses.bsb: I thank God, whom I serve with a clear conscience as did my forefathers, as I constantly remember you night and day in my prayers.

verses.kjv: Greatly desiring to see thee, being mindful of thy tears, that I may be filled with joy;
verses.bsb: Recalling your tears, I long to see you so that I may be filled with joy.

verses.kjv: When I call to remembrance the unfeigned faith that is in thee, which dwelt first in thy grandmother Lois, and thy mother Eunice; and I am persuaded that in thee also.
verses.bsb: I am reminded of your sincere faith, which first dwelt in your grandmother Lois and your mother Eunice, and I am convinced is in you as well.

verses.kjv: Wherefore I put thee in remembrance that thou stir up the gift of God, which is in thee by the putting on of my hands.
verses.bsb: For this reason I remind you to fan into flame the gift of God, which is in you through the laying on of my hands.

verses.kjv: For God hath not given us the spirit of fear; but of power, and of love, and of a sound mind.
verses.bsb: For God has not given us a spirit of fear, but of power, love, and self-control.

verses.kjv: Be not thou therefore ashamed of the testimony of our Lord, nor of me his prisoner: but be thou partaker of the afflictions of the gospel according to the power of God;
verses.bsb: So do not be ashamed of the testimony of our Lord, or of me, His prisoner. Instead, join me in suffering for the gospel by the power of God.

verses.kjv: Who hath saved us, and called us with an holy calling, not according to our works, but according to his own purpose and grace, which was given us in Christ Jesus before the world began,
verses.bsb: He has saved us and called us to a holy calling, not because of our works, but by His own purpose and by the grace He granted us in Christ Jesus before time began.

verses.kjv: But is now made manifest by the appearing of our Saviour Jesus Christ, who hath abolished death, and hath brought life and immortality to light through the gospel:
verses.bsb: And now He has revealed this grace through the appearing of our Savior, Christ Jesus, who has abolished death and illuminated the way to life and immortality through the gospel,

verses.kjv: Whereunto I am appointed a preacher, and an apostle, and a teacher of the Gentiles.
verses.bsb: to which I was appointed as a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher.

verses.kjv: For the which cause I also suffer these things: nevertheless I am not ashamed: for I know whom I have believed, and am persuaded that he is able to keep that which I have committed unto him against that day.
verses.bsb: For this reason, even though I suffer as I do, I am not ashamed; for I know whom I have believed, and I am convinced that He is able to guard what I have entrusted to Him for that day.

verses.kjv: Hold fast the form of sound words, which thou hast heard of me, in faith and love which is in Christ Jesus.
verses.bsb: Hold on to the pattern of sound teaching you have heard from me, with the faith and love that are in Christ Jesus.

verses.kjv: That good thing which was committed unto thee keep by the Holy Ghost which dwelleth in us.
verses.bsb: Guard the treasure entrusted to you, with the help of the Holy Spirit who dwells in us.

verses.kjv: This thou knowest, that all they which are in Asia be turned away from me; of whom are Phygellus and Hermogenes.
verses.bsb: You know that everyone in the Province of Asia has deserted me, including Phygelus and Hermogenes.

verses.kjv: The Lord give mercy unto the house of Onesiphorus; for he oft refreshed me, and was not ashamed of my chain:
verses.bsb: May the Lord grant mercy to the household of Onesiphorus, because he has often refreshed me and was unashamed of my chains.

verses.kjv: But, when he was in Rome, he sought me out very diligently, and found me.
verses.bsb: Indeed, when he arrived in Rome, he searched diligently until he found me.

verses.kjv: The Lord grant unto him that he may find mercy of the Lord in that day: and in how many things he ministered unto me at Ephesus, thou knowest very well.
verses.bsb: May the Lord grant Onesiphorus His mercy on that day. You know very well how much he ministered to me in Ephesus.

verses.kjv: THOU therefore, my son, be strong in the grace that is in Christ Jesus.
verses.bsb: You therefore, my child, be strong in the grace that is in Christ Jesus.

verses.kjv: And the things that thou hast heard of me among many witnesses, the same commit thou to faithful men, who shall be able to teach others also.
verses.bsb: And the things that you have heard me say among many witnesses, entrust these to faithful men who will be qualified to teach others as well.

verses.kjv: Thou therefore endure hardness, as a good soldier of Jesus Christ.
verses.bsb: Join me in suffering, like a good soldier of Christ Jesus.

verses.kjv: No man that warreth entangleth himself with the affairs of this life; that he may please him who hath chosen him to be a soldier.
verses.bsb: A soldier refrains from entangling himself in civilian affairs, in order to please the one who enlisted him.

verses.kjv: And if a man also strive for masteries, yet is he not crowned, except he strive lawfully.
verses.bsb: Likewise, a competitor does not receive the crown unless he competes according to the rules.

verses.kjv: The husbandman that laboureth must be first partaker of the fruits.
verses.bsb: The hardworking farmer should be the first to partake of the crops.

verses.kjv: Consider what I say; and the Lord give thee understanding in all things.
verses.bsb: Consider what I am saying, for the Lord will give you insight into all things.

verses.kjv: Remember that Jesus Christ of the seed of David was raised from the dead according to my gospel:
verses.bsb: Remember Jesus Christ, raised from the dead, descended from David, as proclaimed by my gospel,

verses.kjv: Wherein I suffer trouble, as an evil doer, even unto bonds; but the word of God is not bound.
verses.bsb: for which I suffer to the extent of being chained like a criminal. But the word of God cannot be chained!

verses.kjv: Therefore I endure all things for the elect’s sakes, that they may also obtain the salvation which is in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.
verses.bsb: For this reason I endure all things for the sake of the elect, so that they too may obtain the salvation that is in Christ Jesus, with eternal glory.

verses.kjv: It is a faithful saying: For if we be dead with him, we shall also live with him:
verses.bsb: This is a trustworthy saying:  If we died with Him, we will also live with Him;

verses.kjv: If we suffer, we shall also reign with him: if we deny him, he also will deny us:
verses.bsb: if we endure, we will also reign with Him; if we deny Him, He will also deny us;

verses.kjv: If we believe not, yet he abideth faithful: he cannot deny himself.
verses.bsb: if we are faithless, He remains faithful, for He cannot deny Himself.

verses.kjv: Of these things put them in remembrance, charging them before the Lord that they strive not about words to no profit, but to the subverting of the hearers.
verses.bsb: Remind the believers of these things, charging them before God to avoid quarreling over words, which succeeds only in leading the listeners to ruin.

verses.kjv: Study to shew thyself approved unto God, a workman that needeth not to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth.
verses.bsb: Make every effort to present yourself approved to God, an unashamed workman who accurately handles the word of truth.

verses.kjv: But shun profane and vain babblings: for they will increase unto more ungodliness.
verses.bsb: But avoid irreverent, empty chatter, which will only lead to more ungodliness,

verses.kjv: And their word will eat as doth a canker: of whom is Hymenæus and Philetus;
verses.bsb: and the talk of such men will spread like gangrene. Among them are Hymenaeus and Philetus,

verses.kjv: Who concerning the truth have erred, saying that the resurrection is past already; and overthrow the faith of some.
verses.bsb: who have deviated from the truth. They say that the resurrection has already occurred, and they undermine the faith of some.

verses.kjv: Nevertheless the foundation of God standeth sure, having this seal, The Lord knoweth them that are his. And, Let every one that nameth the name of Christ depart from iniquity.
verses.bsb: Nevertheless, God’s firm foundation stands, bearing this seal: “The Lord knows those who are His,” and, “Everyone who calls on the name of the Lord must turn away from iniquity.”

verses.kjv: But in a great house there are not only vessels of gold and of silver, but also of wood and of earth; and some to honour, and some to dishonour.
verses.bsb: A large house contains not only vessels of gold and silver, but also of wood and clay. Some indeed are for honorable use, but others are for common use.

verses.kjv: If a man therefore purge himself from these, he shall be a vessel unto honour, sanctified, and meet for the master’s use, and prepared unto every good work.
verses.bsb: So if anyone cleanses himself of what is unfit, he will be a vessel for honor: sanctified, useful to the Master, and prepared for every good work.

verses.kjv: Flee also youthful lusts: but follow righteousness, faith, charity, peace, with them that call on the Lord out of a pure heart.
verses.bsb: Flee from youthful passions and pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace, together with those who call on the Lord out of a pure heart.

verses.kjv: But foolish and unlearned questions avoid, knowing that they do gender strifes.
verses.bsb: But reject foolish and ignorant speculation, for you know that it breeds quarreling.

verses.kjv: And the servant of the Lord must not strive; but be gentle unto all men, apt to teach, patient,
verses.bsb: And a servant of the Lord must not be quarrelsome, but must be kind to everyone, able to teach, and forbearing.

verses.kjv: In meekness instructing those that oppose themselves; if God peradventure will give them repentance to the acknowledging of the truth;
verses.bsb: He must gently reprove those who oppose him, in the hope that God may grant them repentance leading to a knowledge of the truth.

verses.kjv: And that they may recover themselves out of the snare of the devil, who are taken captive by him at his will.
verses.bsb: Then they will come to their senses and escape the snare of the devil, who has taken them captive to his will.

verses.kjv: THIS know also, that in the last days perilous times shall come.
verses.bsb: But understand this: In the last days terrible times will come.

verses.kjv: For men shall be lovers of their own selves, covetous, boasters, proud, blasphemers, disobedient to parents, unthankful, unholy,
verses.bsb: For men will be lovers of themselves, lovers of money, boastful, arrogant, abusive, disobedient to their parents, ungrateful, unholy,

verses.kjv: Without natural affection, trucebreakers, false accusers, incontinent, fierce, despisers of those that are good,
verses.bsb: unloving, unforgiving, slanderous, without self-control, brutal, without love of good,

verses.kjv: Traitors, heady, highminded, lovers of pleasures more than lovers of God;
verses.bsb: traitorous, reckless, conceited, lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of God,

verses.kjv: Having a form of godliness, but denying the power thereof: from such turn away.
verses.bsb: having a form of godliness but denying its power. Turn away from such as these!

verses.kjv: For of this sort are they which creep into houses, and lead captive silly women laden with sins, led away with divers lusts,
verses.bsb: They are the kind who worm their way into households and captivate vulnerable women who are weighed down with sins and led astray by various passions,

verses.kjv: Ever learning, and never able to come to the knowledge of the truth.
verses.bsb: who are always learning but never able to come to a knowledge of the truth.

verses.kjv: Now as Jannes and Jambres withstood Moses, so do these also resist the truth: men of corrupt minds, reprobate concerning the faith.
verses.bsb: Just as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, so also these men oppose the truth. They are depraved in mind and disqualified from the faith.

verses.kjv: But they shall proceed no further: for their folly shall be manifest unto all men, as theirs also was.
verses.bsb: But they will not advance much further. For just like Jannes and Jambres, their folly will be plain to everyone.

verses.kjv: But thou hast fully known my doctrine, manner of life, purpose, faith, longsuffering, charity, patience,
verses.bsb: You, however, have observed my teaching, my conduct, my purpose, my faith, my patience, my love, my perseverance,

verses.kjv: Persecutions, afflictions, which came unto me at Antioch, at Iconium, at Lystra; what persecutions I endured: but out of them all the Lord delivered me.
verses.bsb: my persecutions, and the sufferings that came upon me in Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. What persecutions I endured! Yet the Lord rescued me from all of them.

verses.kjv: Yea, and all that will live godly in Christ Jesus shall suffer persecution.
verses.bsb: Indeed, all who desire to live godly lives in Christ Jesus will be persecuted,

verses.kjv: But evil men and seducers shall wax worse and worse, deceiving, and being deceived.
verses.bsb: while evil men and imposters go from bad to worse, deceiving and being deceived.

verses.kjv: But continue thou in the things which thou hast learned and hast been assured of, knowing of whom thou hast learned them;
verses.bsb: But as for you, continue in the things you have learned and firmly believed, since you know from whom you have learned them.

verses.kjv: And that from a child thou hast known the holy scriptures, which are able to make thee wise unto salvation through faith which is in Christ Jesus.
verses.bsb: From infancy you have known the Holy Scriptures, which are able to make you wise for salvation through faith in Christ Jesus.

verses.kjv: All scripture is given by inspiration of God, and is profitable for doctrine, for reproof, for correction, for instruction in righteousness:
verses.bsb: All Scripture is God-breathed and is useful for instruction, for conviction, for correction, and for training in righteousness,

verses.kjv: That the man of God may be perfect, throughly furnished unto all good works.
verses.bsb: so that the man of God may be complete, fully equipped for every good work.

verses.kjv: I CHARGE thee therefore before God, and the Lord Jesus Christ, who shall judge the quick and the dead at his appearing and his kingdom;
verses.bsb: I charge you in the presence of God and of Christ Jesus, who will judge the living and the dead, and in view of His appearing and His kingdom:

verses.kjv: Preach the word; be instant in season, out of season; reprove, rebuke, exhort with all longsuffering and doctrine.
verses.bsb: Preach the word; be prepared in season and out of season; reprove, rebuke, and encourage with every form of patient instruction.

verses.kjv: For the time will come when they will not endure sound doctrine; but after their own lusts shall they heap to themselves teachers, having itching ears;
verses.bsb: For the time will come when men will not tolerate sound doctrine, but with itching ears they will gather around themselves teachers to suit their own desires.

verses.kjv: And they shall turn away their ears from the truth, and shall be turned unto fables.
verses.bsb: So they will turn their ears away from the truth and turn aside to myths.

verses.kjv: But watch thou in all things, endure afflictions, do the work of an evangelist, make full proof of thy ministry.
verses.bsb: But you, be sober in all things, endure hardship, do the work of an evangelist, fulfill your ministry.

verses.kjv: For I am now ready to be offered, and the time of my departure is at hand.
verses.bsb: For I am already being poured out like a drink offering, and the time of my departure is at hand.

verses.kjv: I have fought a good fight, I have finished my course, I have kept the faith:
verses.bsb: I have fought the good fight, I have finished the race, I have kept the faith.

verses.kjv: Henceforth there is laid up for me a crown of righteousness, which the Lord, the righteous judge, shall give me at that day: and not to me only, but unto all them also that love his appearing.
verses.bsb: From now on there is laid up for me the crown of righteousness, which the Lord, the righteous Judge, will award to me on that day—and not only to me, but to all who crave His appearing.

verses.kjv: Do thy diligence to come shortly unto me:
verses.bsb: Make every effort to come to me quickly,

verses.kjv: For Demas hath forsaken me, having loved this present world, and is departed unto Thessalonica; Crescens to Galatia, Titus unto Dalmatia.
verses.bsb: because Demas, in his love of this world, has deserted me and gone to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus to Dalmatia.

verses.kjv: Only Luke is with me. Take Mark, and bring him with thee: for he is profitable to me for the ministry.
verses.bsb: Only Luke is with me. Get Mark and bring him with you, because he is useful to me in the ministry.

verses.kjv: And Tychicus have I sent to Ephesus.
verses.bsb: Tychicus, however, I have sent to Ephesus.

verses.kjv: The cloke that I left at Troas with Carpus, when thou comest, bring with thee, and the books, but especially the parchments.
verses.bsb: When you come, bring the cloak that I left with Carpus at Troas, and my scrolls, especially the parchments.

verses.kjv: Alexander the coppersmith did me much evil: the Lord reward him according to his works:
verses.bsb: Alexander the coppersmith did great harm to me. The Lord will repay him according to his deeds.

verses.kjv: Of whom be thou ware also; for he hath greatly withstood our words.
verses.bsb: You too should beware of him, for he has vigorously opposed our message.

verses.kjv: At my first answer no man stood with me, but all men forsook me: I pray God that it may not be laid to their charge.
verses.bsb: At my first defense, no one stood with me, but everyone deserted me. May it not be charged against them.

verses.kjv: Notwithstanding the Lord stood with me, and strengthened me; that by me the preaching might be fully known, and that all the Gentiles might hear: and I was delivered out of the mouth of the lion.
verses.bsb: But the Lord stood by me and strengthened me, so that through me the message would be fully proclaimed, and all the Gentiles would hear it. So I was delivered from the mouth of the lion.

verses.kjv: And the Lord shall deliver me from every evil work, and will preserve me unto his heavenly kingdom: to whom be glory for ever and ever. Amen.
verses.bsb: And the Lord will rescue me from every evil action and bring me safely into His heavenly kingdom. To Him be the glory forever and ever. Amen.

verses.kjv: Salute Prisca and Aquila, and the household of Onesiphorus.
verses.bsb: Greet Prisca and Aquila, as well as the household of Onesiphorus.

verses.kjv: Erastus abode at Corinth: but Trophimus have I left at Miletum sick.
verses.bsb: Erastus has remained at Corinth, and Trophimus I left sick in Miletus.

verses.kjv: Do thy diligence to come before winter. Eubulus greeteth thee, and Pudens, and Linus, and Claudia, and all the brethren.
verses.bsb: Make every effort to come to me before winter.  Eubulus sends you greetings, as do Pudens, Linus, Claudia, and all the brothers.

verses.kjv: The Lord Jesus Christ be with thy spirit. Grace be with you. Amen. ¶ The second epistle unto Timotheus, ordained the first bishop of the church of the Ephesians, was written from Rome, when Paul was brought before Nero the second time.
verses.bsb: The Lord be with your spirit. Grace be with you all.
